zh.lifeSummary: 當Henri de Fougères於大約1087年出生在法國布列塔尼時，他的父親Raoul I de Fougères Baron de Fougères39歲，母親Havoise de Brionne-Bienfaite39歲。他於大約1120年與Olive de Penthièvre結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1151年在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉藍代安享年65歲，埋葬在法國巴-諾門迪曼其薩維尼勒-維額。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henri de Fougères于大约1087年出生在法国布列塔尼时，他的父亲Raoul I de Fougères Baron de Fougères39岁，母亲Havoise de Brionne-Bienfaite39岁。他于大约1120年与Olive de Penthièvre结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1151年在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉藍代安享年65岁，埋葬在法国巴-諾門迪曼其薩維尼勒-維額。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fougères
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Alcide, Armand, Emile, Fleurette, Thierry.

French (Fougère): topographic name for someone who lived in a place densely grown with ferns, from Old French foug(i)ere ‘fern, bracken’ (from Late Latin filicaria); or a habitational name from (La) Fougère, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Fugere .

History: Jean Fougère from Poupry in Eure-et-Loir, France, married first Marie Bourg in Port-Royal in Acadia (now Annapolis Royal in NS, Canada) in 1713, and second Marie-Madeleine Belliveau in Port-Toulouse (St. Peters), NS, Canada, c. 1728.

variants.name: Fugere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Celine, Emile, Gilles, Lucien, Normand, Philippe, Pierre, Sylvian.
French (Fugère): variant of Fougère (see Fougere ) and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Henri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henri de Fougères was born about 1087, in Brittany, France, his father, Raoul I de Fougères Baron de Fougères, was 39 and his mother, Havoise de Brionne-Bienfaite, was 39. He married Olive de Penthièvre about 1120. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He died in 1151, in Landéan, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, at the age of 65, and was buried in Savigny-le-Vieux, Manche, Lower Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henri de Fougères est né environ 1087, à Bretagne, France, son père, Raoul I de Fougères Baron de Fougères, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Havoise de Brionne-Bienfaite, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Olive de Penthièvre environ 1120. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1151, à Landéan, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Savigny-le-Vieux, Manche, Basse-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henri de Fougères um 1087 in Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raoul I de Fougères Baron de Fougères 39 und seine Mutter Havoise de Brionne-Bienfaite 39. Er hat um 1120 Olive de Penthièvre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1151 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Landéan, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in Savigny-le-Vieux, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henri de Fougères è nato il circa 1087 nel Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Raoul I de Fougères Baron de Fougères, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Havoise de Brionne-Bienfaite, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Olive de Penthièvre circa 1120. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1151, nel Landéan, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Savigny-le-Vieux, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Henri de Fougèresが約1087年にフランスブレタグンで生まれた時，父Raoul I de Fougères Baron de Fougèresは39歳，母Havoise de Brionne-Bienfaiteは39歳であった。約1120年にOlive de Penthièvreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1151年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインランドeアンで65歳で死去し，フランスバセ-ノーマンディマンチェサヴィグニー-レ-ヴィエウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henri de Fougères(이)가 대략 1087년 프랑스 브레타그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raoul I de Fougères Baron de Fougères(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Havoise de Brionne-Bienfaite(은)는 39세였다. 그는 대략 1120년 Olive de Penthièvre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1151년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 랜드e아에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 배세-노먼디 먼체 서아비그니-레-비우스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henri de Fougères nasceu aproximadamente 1087, em Bretagne, França, seu pai, Raoul I de Fougères Baron de Fougères, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Havoise de Brionne-Bienfaite, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Olive de Penthièvre aproximadamente 1120. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1151, em Landéan, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Savigny-le-Vieux, Manche, Basse-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henri de Fougères родился около 1087 г. в местности бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Raoul I de Fougères Baron de Fougères было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Havoise de Brionne-Bienfaite, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Olive de Penthièvre около 1120 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1151 г. в местности ландeан, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности савигни-ле-виеукс, манч, бассе-норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henri de Fougères nació aproximadamente 1087, en Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Raoul I de Fougères Baron de Fougères, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Havoise de Brionne-Bienfaite, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Olive de Penthièvre aproximadamente 1120. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1151, en Landéan, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Savigny-le-Vieux, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia.
